title: Root Veggie Mix
description: A colorful medley of steamed carrots, parsnip, sweet potato, and turnip glazed in butter and thyme.

ingredients.note: peeled and diced into ½-inch pieces
peeled and diced into ½-inch pieces
peeled and diced into ½-inch pieces
peeled and diced into ½-inch pieces
rubbed fine — no whole leaves or stems

steps.instruction: Peel and dice all vegetables into ½-inch cubes, cutting uniformly so they cook evenly.
Place all vegetables in a steamer basket over boiling water. Steam for 20–25 minutes until a fork slides through with no resistance.
Alternatively, boil in low-sodium broth until very tender, then drain.
Heat butter or oil in a wide skillet. Add steamed vegetables and toss gently to coat.
Add broth and thyme. Cook 3–4 minutes over medium-low until vegetables are glazed and extra liquid is reduced.
Season with salt and white pepper. Serve warm and moist with extra butter or broth spooned over.

notes: Cut all pieces the same size before cooking — uneven sizing leads to some pieces being undercooked while others are overdone.
